What We Do

Driveway and Paving Services

From full driveway installs to patios and drainage, every job is prepped properly and finished to last.

Block Paving Driveways

Hard-wearing block paving laid to a solid base, in the colour and pattern to suit your home.

Resin Bound Driveways

Smooth, permeable resin surfaces with a clean, modern finish and very little upkeep.

Patios and Indian Sandstone

Natural stone patios that turn a tired garden into a proper outdoor living space.

Natural Stone and Flagging

Traditional flagging and natural stone, cut in neatly and levelled right.

Tarmac Driveways

Durable tarmac surfacing for driveways, parking areas and access.

Drainage and Groundworks

Proper drainage, kerbing and ground prep so your surface stays sound for years.

The Transformation

Before and After

Watch a recent job go from tired and uneven to a brand-new driveway.

Block Paving Driveway — Burnley

Old worn surface dug out and re-laid with fresh block paving — new sub-base, precision edging and a clean, level finish built to handle years of daily use.

A look at some of the driveways and paving we have completed around Lancashire.

Why Stone Made Drives

A Job Done Properly, Start to Finish

We are a local, hands-on team that treats every driveway like it is our own. No pushy sales, no cutting corners, just solid groundwork and a finish you will be proud of.

Free site visits and honest quotes

We come out, measure up and give you a clear price with no surprises.

Proper preparation

The groundwork and base are where a driveway lives or dies. We never skimp on it.

Quality materials

We use trusted, hard-wearing products built for the British weather.

Tidy and respectful

We keep the site clean and leave your property as we found it.

Meet the Owner

The Team Behind Stone Made Drives

Stone Made Drives Ltd is a Lancashire-based driveway and paving company built on doing things the right way. What started as a passion for quality groundwork has grown into a trusted local name for block paving, resin and natural stone.

Owner Michael is on the tools and on site, so the person you speak to for your quote is the same person making sure the job is finished to standard. That is how we keep our work consistent and our customers happy.

Michael, Owner
